source_text: In Germany, Südzucker continued the modernization of the Offstein production site in 2024. The investment program focuses on improving energy efficiency in production processes and on strengthening the site's role in the special products business. The measure is described as ongoing and is linked to the Offstein site in Germany.

Pfeifer & Langen states that its Polish production sites will be included in an energy-efficiency program. The company aims to reduce energy consumption by more than 30 percent by 2030 through process optimization and investments in more efficient technologies. The statement refers to sugar production sites in Poland and gives 2030 as the target year.
review_comment: City is unknown; country and target year are valid.

source_text: Südzucker reports that bioethanol production remains part of its CropEnergies segment. The company continues to operate bioethanol production facilities within this segment, which is presented as an existing operation alongside the group's sugar and special products activities. No single city is specified in the excerpt.
review_comment: Existing operation, not a new investment.

source_text: ABF Sugar describes bioethanol activities in the United Kingdom as part of its sugar-related business portfolio. The report refers to a UK bioethanol site associated with Hull and describes the activity as a business event under review in 2024. The record is connected to bioethanol production rather than beet sugar production.
review_comment: Event type should be reviewed; wording indicates review rather than concrete investment.

source_text: Tereos reports that it continues to develop starch and alcohol activities alongside its sugar operations in France. The activity is associated with the Lille area production site and is described as ongoing in 2024. The statement links the event to the starch business segment and to starch products rather than to beet sugar production.
review_comment: Valid as broader business development reference.

source_text: Pfeifer & Langen plans to use fully recyclable packaging in Germany by 2024. The statement is connected to the company's sugar business and is represented in the dataset by the Euskirchen Plant in Germany. The event concerns packaging improvement for beet sugar products rather than a change in sugar production capacity.
review_comment: Check whether this should be classified as investment or target.

source_text: ABF Sugar reports that its Spanish sugar operations continued investments in 2024 to improve production capability and operating efficiency. The activity is associated with the Guadalete area site in Jerez de la Frontera, Spain. The report describes the measure as an investment related to beet sugar operations and production capability, although no exact capacity value is provided.

Südzucker states that its sugar segment is preparing measures to reduce energy use and emissions at German production facilities by 2030. The event is represented by the Ochsenfurt Plant in Germany and is classified as a planned decarbonization investment. The source statement links the measure to beet sugar production and to the target year 2030.
review_comment: Valid, but facility-level details need confirmation.
